// Search for electricity rate fields
const electricityFields = [];
for (let i = 0; i < 200; i++) {
  const fields = ['d_', 'e_', 'h_', 'j_', 'k_', 'l_', 'm_', 'n_', 'ref_d_', 'ref_e_', 'ref_h_', 'ref_l_'];
  fields.forEach(prefix => {
    const fieldId = prefix + i;
    const value = window.TEUI.StateManager?.getValue(fieldId);
    if (value !== null && value !== undefined && value !== '') {
      electricityFields.push({ field: fieldId, value: parseFloat(value) });
    }
  });
}

// Find fields with small values (0.05 to 0.50 range typical for $/kWh)
const rateFields = electricityFields.filter(f => {
  const val = f.value;
  return !isNaN(val) && val > 0.01 && val < 1.0;
});

console.log('Fields that might be electricity rates ($/kWh):');
console.table(rateFields);

// Also search for l_ prefix fields
const lFields = electricityFields.filter(f => f.field.startsWith('l_') || f.field.startsWith('ref_l_'));
console.log('\nAll L-column fields:');
console.table(lFields);
